title: Over half of all new music on streaming sites is now AI-generated, and the number is growing rapidly — but one platform is bringing the hammer down hard
summary: But it's still good to see a music streaming service try to contend with AI slop, instead of embracing it or just, well… ignoring it. ➡️ Read our full guide to the best hi-res music players 1.
